hero.title: Build, Sell, And Work Smarter Online.
hero.description: Digital Blueprint Lab creates practical guides, client systems, templates, and AI resources for freelancers, creators, and digital product builders.

about.title: Inside The Lab
about.description1: Digital Blueprint Lab is a modern digital lab focused on practical execution, freelancing systems, AI-assisted workflows, and digital product building.
about.description2: We believe success online is built through systems, execution, and clarity - not fake hype or unrealistic promises.

product.title: Digital Launch Bundle
product.subtitle: A practical digital starter bundle.
product.description: A practical digital starter bundle designed to help beginners understand online work, digital products, client communication, freelancing systems, and modern digital execution.

clientKit.title: DBL Client Kit
clientKit.subtitle: A practical client management system.
clientKit.description: DBL Client Kit is a practical client management system for freelancers and digital service providers. It includes ready-to-use client messages, DBL rules, client handling tools, checklists, and real-world examples.
features: Pricing, revision, delivery, and follow-up templates

systems.title: What DBL Helps You Build
systems.subtitle: Clear resources connected to real products, practical workflows, and upcoming tools.
systems.aiDescription: A coming collection of business prompts with Arabic explanations for freelancers and digital builders.
systems.fsDescription: Ready messages, onboarding steps, scope control, pricing replies, and delivery workflows.
systems.tpDescription: Practical books that turn online work, digital products, and execution into clear steps.
systems.dtDescription: Reusable assets for organizing clients, offers, content, products, and delivery.
systems.pbDescription: Simple execution frameworks for moving from idea to published product without getting stuck.

cta.title: Start Building Your Digital Blueprint Today.

about.title: An independent lab for practical digital growth.
about.lead: Digital Blueprint Lab helps creators, freelancers, and digital builders develop useful systems, AI workflows, digital products, and modern online business skills.
about.missionBody: DBL promotes practical execution, clarity, organization, and long-term digital growth instead of hype, shortcuts, or unrealistic promises.
about.focus3: Digital products, templates, and repeatable assets
about.focus4: Clear execution habits for sustainable online work

contact.title: Connect with Digital Blueprint Lab.
contact.lead: Use the official channels below for questions, support, collaborations, or product inquiries.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.lead: This policy explains how refunds are handled for DBL digital products and services.
refund.digitalBody: Digital products are non-refundable after download or access has been granted.
refund.exceptionBody: Products or services that require recurring monthly subscriptions may be eligible for cancellation according to their subscription terms.
refund.supportBody: If you have questions about access, delivery, or subscription cancellation, contact DBL through the official contact channels.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.lead: These terms define how DBL products, files, templates, and resources may be used.
terms.rule1: Products are for personal use only.
terms.rule4: Uploading products to third-party websites is prohibited.
terms.rule5: Sharing purchased files with others is prohibited.
terms.rule6: DBL reserves the right to update products and policies when necessary.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: This policy explains how DBL handles simple website data, contact information, cookies, and analytics.
privacy.analyticsBody: DBL may use basic analytics to understand visitor activity, page performance, and general website usage.
privacy.usageBody: Usage information may include pages visited, device type, browser type, and approximate interaction data.
privacy.contactBody: If you contact DBL, your message and contact details are used only to respond to your request or provide support.
privacy.cookiesBody: The website may use cookies or local storage for basic functionality such as saving language preferences.
privacy.protectionBody: DBL is committed to handling information responsibly and keeping data collection simple, limited, and relevant.
